validate.notes: All validations passed. Docker build succeeded. NOP test correctly returns reward=0 (3 f2p tests fail on buggy code). Gold test returns reward=1 (all 11 tests pass after fix). Rubric judge returns 0.5 due to missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (expected in this environment).

CI commands discovered from .github/workflows/test-python.yml (runs lint_backend.sh and type_check_backend.sh) and test-hygiene.yml. Verified both commands pass on base commit ca84f3e.
